comment: Per-GAME community online server switches. Distinct from rpcn_servers.json (which is the RPCN account/host list). This maps a PS3 game serial to the DNS 'IP swap list' that redirects the game's dead first-party server hostnames to a community replacement server. Applied per game via the core's Net@@IP swap list config (the DNS hook reads it at game boot). Bundled so it works fully offline; an updatable copy is fetched from the remote URL in RpcnRepository and overrides this when reachable. The remote registry is the source of truth - community server IPs can change.
ip_note: 206.189.232.242 is the community-maintained Demon's Souls (DESSEGO) server. If it moves, the remote registry is updated and this bundle becomes a fallback only.
